overview: PriceWise is a smart product price comparison platform that lets users search products and compare prices across Amazon, Flipkart, eBay, and other stores side-by-side — with automatic best-deal highlighting, wishlists, and a stunning glassmorphism UI.
features: Wishlist and comparison history for logged-in users
Responsive glassmorphism UI with smooth animations
Filter by category, brand, price range, and rating
